title: xtra-flaky russian pasta pasta
description: a resinous, flaky, lazy-sunday russian dish featuring penne pasta with an al-dente finish, perfect for a buddhist temple-friendly iron teppan vessel
instructions: cook the penne pasta according to package instructions until al-dente.
in a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
add 2 cloves of minced garlic and saut3e until fragrant.
whisk in 1 cup of milk and 1 large egg.
bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened.
remove from heat and stir in 1/2 cup of grated cheese and 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh parsley.
add the cooked penne pasta to the skillet and toss until well coated.
season with salt, black pepper, and dried thyme to taste.
